title: Lead Analyst - Vessel Performance, Maritime
description:
Join a global leader in digital solutions for smart shipping, delivering cutting-edge technologies for fuel monitoring, vessel performance, emissions tracking, regulatory compliance, and weather routing. Seeking an experienced Lead Analyst - Vessel Performance to support their Operational Monitoring Center and contribute to optimizing vessel performance and safety at sea. This is an ashore role based in Singapore.


Key Responsibilities:

* Collect operational data (vessel tracking, SatComs, characteristics, constraints) 72–24 hours prior to departure.

* Generate optimized routes and speed recommendations using advanced weather routing software.

* Deliver accurate meteorological and oceanographic forecasts and assist captains in voyage planning.

* Provide remote support to vessels during voyages, particularly in adverse weather conditions.

* Monitor vessel performance, fuel consumption, and adherence to recommended routes.

* Establish post-voyage reports, analyzing forecast vs. actual conditions and advising on claims when necessary.

* Liaise directly with captains, offering real-time support and expert navigation advice.

* Contribute feedback on routing software and operational processes to support continuous improvement.


Requirement:-

* **Sea Experience:**

  • Navigation officer during 2 years at least within the last 4 years, including Passage Planing preparations
  • Officer of the Watch on Transoceanic vessels during 4 years at least (TransAtlantic, TransPacific crossings
  • Practical use of weather routing softwares or services
  • Rough seas navigation strong feedback
  • Experience managing vessels fleet performance.

**Preferred:**

* Experience in a Weather Routing or Operational Monitoring Center.

* Background as officer on gas carriers, tankers, container vessels, bulk carriers, or passenger ships.

* Experience as Chief Mate or Second Officer.

* Exposure to polar navigation.

* Certified studies in meteorology or oceanography.

* Experience providing onsite technical support to maritime companies.

* Familiarity with operational and seakeeping software.

* Proficient in Excel, PowerPoint, JIRA, and data visualization tools.


**Personal Attributes:**

* Strong attention to captain requirements and contract adherence.

* Ability to initiate direct contact with vessels (e.g., satellite phone) when deviations occur.

* Calm and professional demeanor under stress and challenging sea conditions.

* Commitment to impartial reporting of any incidents or communication challenges.

* Analytical mindset for post-voyage data interpretation and claim support.

* Curiosity and initiative to enhance analysis with external data sources.

* Proactive in suggesting IT/software improvements.

* Passion for delivering reliable advice to captains at all times.

* Strong documentation and feedback writing skills.


This role is ideal for experienced seafarers/seaman looking to bring their maritime expertise ashore and make a real impact in a dynamic, tech-driven operational environment and it is an onshorerole.


Please send in your resume to : daphne@skillsforce.com.sg

R1100672

EA licence no: 99C3289

postedCompany.description:
SKILLSFORCE MANAGEMENT CONSULTANCY PTE LTD

 

Integrating People Competency

 

Skillsforce provides Recruitment and Human Capital Solutions tailored to our clients’ needs so that they can meet the challenges of today’s dynamic business environment.


About Us:
Skillsforce Management Consultancy Pte. Ltd. was established in 1998 and has since grown into a successful enterprise specializing in recruitment for temporary, contract, and permanent positions. Our services also extend to HR Consultancy for start-up companies and HR Outsource Services for SMEs. Additionally, we support work pass services, including application, renewal, and cancellation of work passes.

Our Unique Approach:
What sets us apart from our competitors is our focus on integrating people competencies. We don’t just recruit the most competent talents; we ensure they align with our clients’ cultural fit and corporate values, helping them achieve their business goals and objectives. We pride ourselves on providing high-level search services while offering competitive rates.


Our Agile and Customized Services:
Thanks to our boutique setup, we can respond quickly to our clients' needs, customizing our service offerings and pricing to meet their dynamic business requirements. We stay closely aligned with our clients' objectives and goals.
